reference_name: R scorecard German Credit vignette extractor

model.initial_formula: creditability ~ status.of.existing.checking.account_woe + duration.in.month_woe +      credit.history_woe + purpose_woe + credit.amount_woe + savings.account.and.bonds_woe +      present.employment.since_woe + installment.rate.in.percentage.of.disposable.income_woe +      other.debtors.or.guarantors_woe + property_woe + age.in.years_woe +      other.installment.plans_woe + housing_woe
model.selected_formula: creditability ~ status.of.existing.checking.account_woe + duration.in.month_woe +      credit.history_woe + purpose_woe + credit.amount_woe + savings.account.and.bonds_woe +      installment.rate.in.percentage.of.disposable.income_woe +      age.in.years_woe + other.installment.plans_woe + housing_woe

scorecard_scaling.source: scorecard::scorecard defaults unless changed by package version
